title: Error
description: Details of the error condition such as the source of the error, reason code for the error, if the error is recoverable, and details about the error

Source.description: The application that generated this error

ReasonCode.description: A unique constant identifying the error case encountered during transaction processing

Description.description: Short description of the ReasonCode field

Recoverable.description: Indicates whether this error will always be returned for this request, or retrying could change the outcome
